figures.caption: Figure 2: Reference measurements from Choi et al. of "wake characteristics behind a single sphere at Re = 1000: (a) normalized mean streamwise velocity; (b) streamwise turbulence intensity along the centerline; (c) power spectral density (PSD) of the vertical velocity" (reference measurements: ∎, rest: literature comparisons from Choi and Park [13])
Figure 3: Normalized mean streamwise velocity u/U∞ showing recirculation length lr/D = 1.8 at Res = 1000
Figure 4: RMS of streamwise velocity fluctuations u′rms/U∞ along centerline at Res = 1000. Two peaks at x/D = 1.5 and 2.4 match reference [13].
Figure 5: Power spectral density of vertical velocity showing dominant frequency at St ≈ 0.18, consistent with experimental vortex shedding frequency for Res = 1000 [13]

Figure 6: Mean streamwise velocity field ⟨u⟩/U∞ at Res = 1000 validation. Contour lines show velocity magnitude. (a) LBM simulation with cumulant collision operator. (b) PIV experimental data from Choi & Park [13].

Figure 7: Mean vertical velocity field ⟨v⟩/U∞ at Res = 1000 validation. Contour lines show velocity magnitude. (a) LBM simulation with cumulant collision operator. (b) PIV experimental data from Choi & Park [13].
Figure 8: Instantaneous turbulent structures visualized showing characteristic hairpin vortices with identifiable heads and trailing legs at Res = 1000.
Figure 9: Slice plot of the middle plane of x-direction velocity of the baseline UNet model from the validation set
